common.metaDescription: Application tracker and intelligent job search

auth.loginSubtitle: Manage applications, profile, and autofill in one workspace.
auth.registerSubtitle: Sign up in under a minute and start searching jobs with your prompt.
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send reset instructions.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a secure password to protect your account.
auth.heroLoginHeadline: Pick up where you left off.
auth.heroLoginLead: Sign in to your personal workspace: searches, applications, and profile always in sync.
auth.heroRegisterLead: Create an account in seconds and turn application chaos into a clear workflow.
auth.heroForgotLead: Send a reset link to your email and get back to work quickly.
auth.heroResetLead: Choose a strong password to protect your applications and personal data.
auth.featureLiveText: Hundreds of verified ATS listings filtered to your prompt.
auth.featureTrackerText: Application status, follow-ups, and automatic links to job postings.
auth.featureCompanionText: Apply faster with integrated profile and autofill.

candidature.title: Applications
candidature.pageLead: Pipeline, follow-ups, and status for every application in one workspace.

trackerSource.manualHint: Added manually or from job URL analysis

candidature.formIntroNew: Add a manual application. If you start from Live Jobs, use Open and Apply: company, role, and link sync automatically.
candidature.emptyDescription: Add your first application in under 30 seconds and start tracking the process.

quickAdd.title: New application
quickAdd.lead: Paste a job link for AI analysis and decide whether to apply, save as draft, or dismiss.
quickAdd.upgradeHint: AI analysis requires a plan with Live Jobs. You can still add manually.

duplicate.title: Job already in tracker
duplicate.liveLead: An application linked to this job (same URL) already exists. No duplicate row was created.
duplicate.annuncioLead: You already applied to this job. To avoid duplicates, the application is not registered again automatically.
duplicate.note: If you are applying again to the same posting at a different time, you can still create a new row.

jobs.title: Live Jobs

searchBanner.backgroundHint: You can keep using the site while we work in the background.

jobs.searchSubtitle: Describe what you want — AI understands role, location, and timeframe
jobs.searchPlaceholder: e.g. Frontend engineer in Dublin, remote, last 10 days…
jobs.emptyDescription: Results will appear below in the table.
jobs.upgradeTitle: Live Jobs is available on Pro or Business
jobs.upgradeDescription: Search hundreds of verified ATS listings, AI prompt analysis, and automatic tracker sync. Free includes the application tracker only.
jobs.archivedDescription: This application no longer appears in the latest Live Jobs search. We show it from the tracker as a historical row in the Applied tab.

filterExcluded.title: Excluded by filters
filterExcluded.subtitle: {{count}} jobs hidden by location, origin, date, or prompt relevance. Check if any are still interesting.
filterExcluded.emptySearch: No jobs match your search. Try other terms or clear the field.
filterExcluded.emptyDefault: No jobs excluded by current filters.

searchPref.title: Search preferences
searchPref.intro: Role, location, posting date, and other constraints belong in the prompt. Jobs come from LinkedIn and company career sites (Greenhouse, Lever, Workable, Ashby).
searchPref.requireActiveApply: Verify active apply link (informational only, does not hide jobs)

jobs.tableEmpty: No offers in this category. Try another filter or run a new search.

setup.missingApiKey: Add GEMINI_API_KEY to .env and restart the backend.
setup.missingBudget: Set a monthly budget in settings.
setup.backendUnreachable: Backend unreachable. Check Docker and try again.

filterEmpty.search: No offers match your search. Try other terms or clear the field.
filterEmpty.dismissed: No dismissed offers. Use Dismiss on offers that aren't relevant.
filterEmpty.applied: No applied offers in this search yet.
filterEmpty.default: No offers with this filter. Try Eligible.

success.appliedHighlighted: Application recorded. Highlighted in list — move on to the next offer.
success.dismissed: Offer dismissed. It won't appear among eligible offers anymore.
success.dismissedFromAnnuncio: Offer dismissed from Analyze job posting. Updated in list.
success.syncedFromAnnuncio: Application synced from Analyze job posting.
success.openedInTab: Job posting opened in a new tab. Use the panel at bottom right when done.

errors.emptyPrompt: Describe what you're looking for in the search field. AI analyzes the prompt and applies filters.

jobs.archivedMissingDescription: This application is no longer in the latest Live Jobs search.
jobs.archivedWithTracker: You can open the tracker or the original job posting.
jobs.archivedNoTracker: Try running a search with the same criteria again.

annuncio.title: Analyze job posting
annuncio.subtitle: AI analysis on the left, job page in the frame on the right. Apply and track without leaving the app.
annuncio.emptyDescription: Paste a job link to get role, company, location, and an AI review before applying.
annuncio.step1Text: From LinkedIn, an ATS, or the company careers page.
annuncio.step2Text: Summary, useful points, and what to verify before submitting.
annuncio.step3Text: Read the posting on the right, fill the form, and record it in the tracker.
annuncio.applyLead: Read the posting in the frame, fill the form, and record the application in the tracker.
annuncio.analyzeLinkLead: Automatic data extraction and quick review before applying.
annuncio.keyboardHint: Press Enter or Cmd+Enter to analyze
annuncio.formOpenedExtension: Form opened in a new tab. Go there and use Fill with AI.
annuncio.formOpenedNoExtension: Form opened in a new tab. Copy the fields below.
annuncio.extensionHint: Configure the Extension ID in your profile for AI autofill on Greenhouse, Lever, and similar.
annuncio.missingFieldsError: Company and role missing: complete the data before saving to tracker

success.dismissed: Job posting dismissed. It won't appear among eligible offers in Live Jobs anymore.
success.added: Added to tracker as submitted application
success.addedWithSync: Added to tracker · {{count}} offer synced in Live Jobs
success.duplicateWithSync: New application recorded · {{count}} offer synced in Live Jobs

billing.title: Subscription
billing.description: Manage plan, limits, and upgrades for Live Jobs and AI features.
billing.ownerDescription: Full access to tracker, Live Jobs, and AI without a Stripe subscription.
billing.aiCallsHint: Prompt analysis and searches this month
billing.stripeNotEnabled: Online payment is not active in this environment yet. When Stripe is configured you can upgrade to Pro directly from here.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Used for quick applications and autofill
profile.descriptionWithEmail: {{email}} · Used for quick applications and autofill
profile.successComplete: Profile saved and complete. You are ready to apply and use autofill.
profile.successIncomplete: Profile saved. Complete name, surname, phone, city, and LinkedIn to unlock everything.
profile.dbImportConfirm: Importing this backup replaces all local database data (applications, profile, jobs, settings). Continue?
profile.dbBackupDescription: Export or import all local data: applications, profile, job searches, dismissals, and settings. Useful when moving the project to another computer.

today.noActions: No urgent actions. Good time to send new applications.
today.pageLead: Follow-ups, interviews, and your daily goal at a glance.

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: Follow-ups, interviews, and reminders linked to your applications
activity.empty: No scheduled activity. Add follow-up or interview dates to applications.

analytics.title: Insights
analytics.description: Statistics and reporting for your applications
analytics.insufficientDescription: Add at least 5 applications to see statistics

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: Documents and contacts linked to your applications
resources.documentsSoon: The document library will be available soon. For now, upload your CV from your profile.
resources.contactsHint: Recruiters and hiring managers will appear here when you add them to applications
resources.companiesHint: Companies will appear here when you add applications

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Manage monitored careers pages: add, prioritize, scan for jobs
companies.jobsRequired: Enable Live Jobs to manage monitored careers pages.

careers.title: Monitored careers pages ({{count}})
careers.searchPlaceholder: Filter by name, slug or URL...
careers.autoDiscoverConfirm: Scan about 40 tech companies. This may take 1-3 minutes. Continue?
careers.autoDiscoverHint: Enable "Mass auto-discovery" in AI and budget.
careers.scanSelectedHint: Select at least one active careers page
careers.offersEmptyDescription: The analyzed pages returned no jobs with a date in the selected period.
careers.empty: No careers pages in the database. Add one or use auto-discover.
careers.addUrlPlaceholder: Careers page URL (ATS or company site)
careers.successAutoDiscover: {{added}} new · {{skipped}} already present · {{failed}} not found of {{scanned}} scanned
careers.successScanNone: {{name}}: no dated jobs in {{period}} ({{total}} total on page)

careersRecent.title: Careers 24h feed
careersRecent.description: Jobs from monitored careers pages: last 24 hours or search by title keyword
careersRecent.scanningHint: Scanning all careers pages. With many companies this can take 2-5 minutes — keep this tab open.
careersRecent.keywordPlaceholder: Word in title (e.g. laravel, python, italian)...
careersRecent.searchScanningHint: Scanning all active careers pages. This may take several minutes.
careersRecent.searchEmptyDescription: Enter a word (e.g. laravel, sales, italian) and search all active monitored careers pages.
careersRecent.searchNoOffersDescription: No active listing title contains "{{keyword}}" on monitored careers pages.
careersRecent.emptyDescription: Run a scan to check all monitored careers pages for jobs posted in the last 24 hours.
careersRecent.noOffersDescription: No careers page returned jobs with a date in the last 24 hours.
careersRecent.noFilterMatchDescription: No job matches your title or location filters.
careersRecent.jobsRequired: Enable Live Jobs to use the careers scan.

errors.trackFailed: Could not save application to tracker

errors.missingAnalysisFields: Company and role missing from analysis

applicationDetail.notFoundDescription: The requested application does not exist or was deleted
applicationDetail.notFoundEmpty: Return to the list and select another application.
applicationDetail.noContactsHint: Add recruiter or hiring manager details when editing the application.

offerApplyModal.title: Application in progress
offerApplyModal.subtitle: Visit the job posting in the open tab, then return here to record the outcome.
offerApplyModal.hint: You can close this panel and keep browsing the list — it stays open until you record the outcome.

applyCompanion.title: Application companion
applyCompanion.sidePanelHint: Side panel alongside the app. Keep browsing Live Jobs in the main window.
applyCompanion.stepsExtension: Multi-step form: 1. Open form · 2. AI fill · 3. Next · 4. Repeat · 5. Submit · 6. Confirm here
applyCompanion.stepsManual: 1. Open the form · 2. Copy fields · 3. Submit · 4. Confirm below
applyCompanion.extensionWarn: Extension not active: set the Extension ID in your profile to use AI fill.
applyCompanion.loginRequired: Sign in to use the companion.
applyCompanion.clickNext: · Click Next on the form and fill again
applyCompanion.recorded: Application recorded as submitted in the tracker.
applyCompanion.formOpenedExtension: Form opened. Switch to that tab, wait for it to load, then use AI fill.
applyCompanion.formOpenedManual: Form opened. Copy fields from this window and paste them into the form.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Find jobs, analyze postings, and monitor careers pages
discover.pageLead: Live search, AI analysis from URL, careers feed, and company monitoring in one premium hub.
discover.searchHint: AI prompt on verified ATS and LinkedIn
discover.urlHint: Analyze a posting by pasting the link
discover.careersHint: New listings from careers pages in the last 24 hours

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Stats, funnel, and goals for your applications
progress.pageLead: Trends, conversion, and channels to see where you perform best.
progress.weeklyGoalHint: Applications sent in the last 7 days
progress.funnelHint: From first submission to interview and offer

v2.migrationBanner: New v2 interface: simplified navigation. Today for actions, Applications for tracking, Discover for premium job search.

landing.heroTitle: Organize applications. Find verified jobs. Apply in seconds.
landing.heroLead: Full tracker, live jobs from real ATS sources, autofill-ready profile, and a companion next to the form — all in one place.
landing.featuresLead: Built for developers, PMs, and designers who want an organized application workflow.
landing.featureTrackerDesc: Visual pipeline, follow-up reminders, CSV export. No more scattered spreadsheets.
landing.featureLiveDesc: Semantic search across hundreds of verified ATS listings. Filter by seniority, location, and stack.
landing.featureAutofillDesc: Complete profile and Chrome extension to fill Greenhouse, Lever, and other ATS forms in seconds.
landing.pricingLead: Pick the plan that matches your application pace. Pro and Business include Live Jobs and AI.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to organize your job search?
landing.ctaLead: Start for free today. No credit card required on the basic plan.
